1. Creating a new `create-question.ts` tool
2. Creating a new `create-work-item.ts` PM agent tool
3. Refactoring the extraction pipeline from always-on to agent-controlled
4. Updating smoke tests to reflect the new behavior
5. Updating chat processor and orchestrator to handle agent-controlled extraction

Based on the context from the memory, this is Phase 4 complete of the extraction pipeline refactor. Let me commit these changes.

content.text: Now I'll stage, commit, and push the changes:

input.command:
git add -A && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Implement agent-controlled extraction and direct entity creation tools

- Remove automatic extraction from chat-processor; orchestrator now controls entity creation
- Add create_question tool (orchestrator) for decision-requiring questions
- Add create_work_item tool (PM agent) for direct task/feature creation
- Extend PM agent suggest_work_items to support project kind creation
- Update work-item-accept route to create projects when needed
- Add helper functions createQuestionRecord and createProjectRecord to queries
- Refactor test suite: pipeline validates agent-driven decisions, onboarding expects orchestrator response, extraction-quality focuses on quality not format
- This completes Phase 4 of the extraction refactor: moving from always-on extraction to agent-controlled creation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
input.description: Stage and commit all changes with descriptive message
